nasb.text: I will strengthen the house of Judah, And I will save the house of Joseph, And I will bring them back, Because I have had compassion on them; And they will be as though I had not rejected them, For I am the Lord their God and I will answer them.

esv.text: “I will strengthen the house of Judah, and I will save the house of Joseph. I will bring them back because I have compassion on them, and they shall be as though I had not rejected them, for I am the Lord their God and I will answer them.

cnv.text: 我要使猶大家強盛起來， 我必拯救約瑟家。 我要使他們歸回， 因為我憐憫他們； 他們好像未遭我棄絕一樣， 因為我是耶和華他們的　神，我必應允他們。

ccb.text: “我必使犹大家强盛， 我必拯救约瑟家。 我必带他们回到故土， 因为我怜悯他们。 他们必好像从未被我抛弃一样， 因为我是他们的上帝耶和华， 我必应允他们的祷告。
